title: Remove remaining #agentic-embed dead import map from package.json
description: package.json still has 'imports': { '#agentic-embed': './src/runtime/adapters/embed.js' } — this is dead code, no source file references it. The #agentic-voice entry was removed in commit e699e630 but #agentic-embed was missed. Remove the entire 'imports' block from package.json.
